---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for CodeLore
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or workflow gap. E.g. "When documenting X, the LLM has to …"

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen — a new tool, a new flag, a change to an existing tool's behavior.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to achieve the same thing, and why they fall short.

**Additional context**
Anything else — example transcripts, sketches of tool output, etc.
